summary: Rechecked OLDA-9 after the issue status changed back to in_progress. The A01-A07 reporting line under A00 is still correct, but all seven A-line agents still return instructionsPath=null in the Paperclip agents API, so the original blocker remains unresolved.

issues.detail: The issue moved from blocked to in_progress without any new thread comment, interaction, or configuration change visible in heartbeat context.
A01-A07 each still return instructionsPath=null from GET /api/companies/{companyId}/agents at recheck time.

next_recommended_action: A board-authenticated operator must set the instructionsPath values for A01-A07 before A00 can mark onboarding complete.
